title: Interfaced (Discontinued)
description: Simple improvements to Minecraft's GUIs and the way information is displayed!
body:
**Update: This mod has been discontinued, and its content is being transferred over to a newer mod of mine in the near future! In addition, all of my future mods will now be on NeoForge exclusively.**

![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/header.png)

![Interfaced Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/mod_logo.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/header.png)

![Interfaced](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/mod_icon.png)

![About](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/about.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/header.png)

Interfaced is a small Minecraft mod for [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) 1.21.1 that improves upon various GUIs in the game. This mod aims to come up with more elegant solutions to the way information is displayed, from replacements for unimmersive debug menus and more!

Interfaced currently has features such as a coordinates HUD overlay when a Compass is in your inventory, item tooltips to display various things such as durability and food properties, a handy item known as the Environment Detector for displaying biome and weather information outside of the F3 menu, and more!

![Dependencies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/dependencies.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/header.png)

### Interfaced requires these mods in order to function:

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Version 0.105.0+)
- [Chrysalis](https://modrinth.com/mod/chrysalis) (Version 0.4.7+)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (Version 3.5.0+)

### Mods that aren't required, but recommended:

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Version 11.0.2+)

![FAQ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/faq.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/interfaced/fabric-main/images/header.png)

**Q: Does this require Fabric API?**

>A: Yes, this mod does require [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)!

**Q: What Minecraft version is this for?**

>A: This mod is made for Minecraft 1.21.1, and I will not be porting it to any older versions! I will always mainly support the latest versions of Minecraft whenever possible.

**Q: Is there a Forge version?**

>A: No, this mod is and will remain exclusive to the Fabric mod loader and I won't be supporting other mod loaders.

---

_This mod is licensed under the MIT license, so you are free to use or reference any code available on the GitHub repository! All I ask is that you refrain from using any assets found within this mod!_
